name: Venus Protocol
special_mechanism_summary: Venus combines Compound-style money markets (vTokens) with its own VAI stablecoin minting against vToken collateral. Venus Prime is a yield-boost program (non-transferable NFT + staked XVS = boosted APY). A Peg Stability Module (PSM) allows 1:1 VAI ↔ USDT/USDC swaps. A 2023 XVS oracle manipulation incident demonstrated TWAP-based oracle vulnerabilities.
notes: C3' combination potential: dominant BSC lending protocol — liquidation bots monitor Venus health factors against PancakeSwap/Chainlink prices; 2023 XVS oracle manipulation incident confirmed BSC TWAP is manipulable with sufficient capital and short timeframe; Venus Prime basis trade: protocols can stake XVS for boosted APY while holding opposite XVS position on a perp DEX; PSM drainable if VAI depegs, similar to MakerDAO PSM attack vector.
